# Festival Art & Books

> Festival Art & Books is a specialist Tolkien rare book dealership run by Mark Faith in
> Mid-Wales, United Kingdom (Machynlleth area). Est. 2001, trading as Festival Art and
> Books since 2009. One of the world's oldest and largest specialist Tolkien rare-book
> dealers — 5,000+ rare Tolkien books sold. First editions of The Hobbit (1937) and The
> Lord of the Rings (1954–55), other Tolkien firsts, and original Tolkien-inspired art.
> Sales on eBay, AbeBooks and direct email — no on-site checkout.

## Collecting Guides

- [Collecting Tolkien Books for Fun and Investment](https://festivalartandbooks.com/guides/collecting-tolkien-books-for-investment): Cornerstone guide on how to collect and invest in Tolkien first editions — condition, pricing, and why issue points rarely matter.
- [The Ballantine Tolkien Paperbacks and Barbara Remington's Cover Art](https://festivalartandbooks.com/guides/ballantine-tolkien-paperbacks-barbara-remington): The 1965 Ballantine paperbacks, Remington's rushed cover art, and how they propelled Tolkien to worldwide fame.
- [Collector's Guide Introduction](https://festivalartandbooks.com/guides/collectors-guide-introduction): Mark Faith's introduction — twenty-five years as a specialist dealer and why this free guide can save collectors time and money.
- [What to Buy](https://festivalartandbooks.com/guides/collectors-guide-what-to-buy): Which Tolkien titles to collect, condition grading, signed books, dust-jacket wear and restoration.
- [Where to Buy](https://festivalartandbooks.com/guides/collectors-guide-where-to-buy): Specialist dealers vs auctions, negotiating, market fundamentals and assessing condition from photos.
- [Technicalities](https://festivalartandbooks.com/guides/collectors-guide-technicalities): Printing history, states vs errors, Lord of the Rings impression charts, proofs and advance reading copies.
- [The Three Eras of Tolkien Books](https://festivalartandbooks.com/guides/collectors-guide-three-eras): Pre-hippie, collector-era and post-Jackson collecting; deluxe editions and long-term value.

## Collector's Guide (hub + chapters)

- [The Tolkien Collector's Guide — hub](https://festivalartandbooks.com/collectors-guide): Mark Faith's complete free collector's guide, readable online chapter by chapter or downloadable as a PDF.

## Expert Q&A

- [Used & Rare Tolkien Books: Q&A](https://festivalartandbooks.com/used-tolkien-books): Answer-first guide on first-edition values, dust jackets, restoration, states and what to collect.

## About & Services

- [About Mark Faith](https://festivalartandbooks.com/about): Biography, credentials, 5,000+ rare Tolkien books sold, TV expert appearances.
- [Sell & Source](https://festivalartandbooks.com/sell-and-source): We buy rare Tolkien books, offer consignment for high-value items, and confidentially source titles.
- [Contact](https://festivalartandbooks.com/contact): Email Mark Faith for advice, valuations, buying or selling rare Tolkien books.

## Current Inventory

- [Catalogue](https://festivalartandbooks.com/books): Browse rare Tolkien books and collectables currently for sale — titles, photos and prices.
- [Rare Tolkien Books & Collectables](https://festivalartandbooks.com/rare-tolkien-books-collectables): The current collection of rare books, art and memorabilia.
- [eBay Shop](https://www.ebay.co.uk/str/festivalartandbooks): Current listings for rare Tolkien books and art.
- [AbeBooks Shop](https://www.abebooks.co.uk/festival-art-and-books-aberdyfi/51881760/sf): Current listings on AbeBooks.

## Resources

- [Resources hub](https://festivalartandbooks.com/resources): Index of guides, journal, events, media, art and the photo gallery.
- [Free Tolkien Collector E-book](https://festivalartandbooks.com/ebook): Download the 26-page PDF guide or read the full guide online.
- [The Journal](https://festivalartandbooks.com/journal): Essays on Tolkien collecting, market commentary and notable finds. Issue 1 (2009) archive is being restored.

## Media

- [TV Appearances](https://festivalartandbooks.com/tv-appearances): Four Rooms, Pawn Stars UK and other television appearances.
- [News & Media](https://festivalartandbooks.com/news-media): Press coverage, interviews and media mentions.
- [Photo Gallery](https://festivalartandbooks.com/photo-gallery): Archive photographs of rare books, events and memorabilia.
- [Festival in the Shire](https://festivalartandbooks.com/festival-in-the-shire): The Tolkien fan festival Mark Faith founded — history and photos.
- [Events](https://festivalartandbooks.com/events): Past exhibitions, talks and Tolkien collecting events.
- [Tolkien Art](https://festivalartandbooks.com/tolkien-art): Tolkien-inspired original art and the artists Mark works with.
